response: At the Drive-In and Muse share the commonality of being English rock bands. Muse is an English rock band from Teignmouth, Devon, formed in 1994, while At the Drive-In is an American punk rock band from El Paso, Texas, formed in 1994. Both bands consist of lead vocals, guitar, bass, and drums, with Matt Bellamy and Chris Wolstenholme leading Muse, and Cedric Bixler, Omar Rodríguez, Paul Hinojos, and Tony Hajjar forming At the Drive-In.
